home.hero_subtitle: A personalized IELTS prep roadmap built around your target band score, with experienced trainers and in-depth practice tools.
home.hero_cta: Register for a free mock test
home.method_text: With D.E.C.O.D.E, learners do not simply study English through formulas. They are guided through six steps: discovering real English, analyzing how language works, connecting with meaning and culture, building IELTS-ready output, recognizing recurring mistakes, and applying English in everyday life.
home.courses_subtitle: A full range of courses for every level — from beginner to advanced — with mentors guiding you all the way.
home.teachers_subtitle: An experienced teaching team that has guided thousands of students to exam success.
home.products_subtitle: Outstanding results from students who completed courses at ABest
home.register_subtitle: Leave your info to get free consultation and take a placement test, completely free.
